free_text: A study of the 12C(6Li,p)17O reaction at E=28 MeV
multiangle spectrograph and detected in nuclear
emulsions. The nuclear emulsions were scanned with
the aid of the automatic scanning facilities at the
digitized data (unobtainable data) per an NRDC
decision for data sets that were published before
2000 (C32 of WP2022-01) for subentry 2, updated entry.
No information on sources of uncertainty.
